ValidationRule.description: Prevent meetings from being marked as completed with a future date
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', Date__c > Today(), OR( ISPICKVAL(Status__c ,'Completed'), ISPICKVAL(Status__c ,'Unqualified') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Meeting date cannot be in the future, please adjust the date before completing
